description: CMIP7 ScenarioMIP Medium-to-Low emission scenario - A scenario exploring a delayed increase in mitigation efforts, short of the Paris temperature goal but achieving net-zero CO2 emissions by the end of the century, with a period of net negative CO2 emissions thereafter to achieve 1.5 °C on a multi-century timescale. Run with prescribed carbon dioxide concentrations (for prescribed carbon dioxide emissions, see `esm-scen7-ml`).
